title: The Highwayman
writer: Alfred Noyes, Jack DeWitt, Duncan Renaldo
actors: Philip Friend, Charles Coburn, Wanda Hendrix
plot: During the 1700s, a masked bandit robs the rich and aids the poor, to the chagrin of the authorities and the corrupt nobility, and prompting the king to task a ruthless man from the Colonies to capture the outlaw.
